hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); file=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); content=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.new_string // .tool_input.content // empty'); if echo "$content" | grep -iE '(password|secret|api_key)\s*=\s*"[^$\{]' 2>/dev/null; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Hardcoded secret detected. Use environment variables or Secret Manager."}'; exit 0; fi; echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
